013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020
021import java.lang.annotation.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
025
026/**
027 * Utility classes and methods for the {@link Tag @Tag} annotation.
028 *
029 */
030public class TagAnnotation {
031
032   /**
033    * Prevents instantiation.
034    */
035   private TagAnnotation() {}
036
037   /**
038    * Builder class.
039    *
040    * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
041    *    <li class='jm'>{@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContext.Builder#annotations(Annotation...)}
042    * </ul>
043    */
044   public static class Builder extends AnnotationObject.Builder {
045
046      private String[] description = {};
047      private ExternalDocs externalDocs = ExternalDocsAnnotation.DEFAULT;
048      private String name = "";
049
050      /**
051       * Constructor.
052       */
053      protected Builder() {
054         super(Tag.class);
055      }
056
057      /**
058       * Instantiates a new {@link Tag @Tag} object initialized with this builder.
059       *
060       * @return A new {@link Tag @Tag} object.
061       */
062      public Tag build() {
063         return new Instance(this);
064      }
065
066      /**
067       * Sets the description property on this annotation.
068       *
069       * @param value The new value for this property.
070       * @return This object.
071       */
072      public Builder description(String...value) {
073         description = value;
074         return this;
075      }
076
077      /**
078       * Sets the {@link Tag#externalDocs} property on this annotation.
079       *
080       * @param value The new value for this property.
081       * @return This object.
082       */
083      public Builder externalDocs(ExternalDocs value) {
084         externalDocs = value;
085         return this;
086      }
087
088      /**
089       * Sets the {@link Tag#name} property on this annotation.
090       *
091       * @param value The new value for this property.
092       * @return This object.
093       */
094      public Builder name(String value) {
095         name = value;
096         return this;
097      }
098
099   }
100
101   @SuppressWarnings({
102      "java:S2160", // equals() inherited from AnnotationObject compares all annotation interface methods; subclass fields are accessed via those methods
103      "ClassExplicitlyAnnotation", // IntelliJ / SonarLint: Instance implements @Tag (AnnotationObject runtime proxy pattern)
104      "all" // Eclipse JDT: AnnotationTypeUsedAsSuperInterface has no dedicated @SuppressWarnings token (JLS 9.6)
105   })
106   private static class Instance extends AnnotationObject implements Tag {
107
108      private final String[] description;
109      private final ExternalDocs externalDocs;
110      private final String name;
111
112      Instance(TagAnnotation.Builder b) {
113         super(b);
114         description = copyOf(b.description);
115         externalDocs = b.externalDocs;
116         name = b.name;
117      }
118
119      @Override /* Overridden from Tag */
120      public ExternalDocs externalDocs() {
121         return externalDocs;
122      }
123
124      @Override /* Overridden from Tag */
125      public String name() {
126         return name;
127      }
128
129      @Override /* Overridden from annotation */
130      public String[] description() {
131         return description;
132      }
133   }
134
135   /** Default value */
136   public static final Tag DEFAULT = create().build();
137
138   /**
139    * Instantiates a new builder for this class.
140    *
141    * @return A new builder object.
142    */
143   public static Builder create() {
144      return new Builder();
145   }
146}
